title: Supporting material for article 'A study protocol for the cardiac effects of a single dose of either oxytocin 2.5 IU or carbetocin 100 µg after caesarean delivery: a prospective randomized controlled multi-centre trial in Norway'
author: Leiv Arne Rosseland
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
These contain supplementary information for our article 'A study protocol for the cardiac effects of a single dose of either oxytocin 2.5 IU or carbetocin 100 µg after caesarean delivery: a prospective randomized controlled multi-centre trial in Norway' 

 - SPIRIT checklist 
- TIDiER checklist 
- Patient consent form with English translation 
- Ethics approval with English translation 
- Protocol signed 
- Norwegian Medicines Agency approval with English translation
